name: Service / Guide Dog, Milo!
description:
Need a trained animal companion to help out?

Well, look no further! Introducing: Milo!

Milo can be a service or guide dog, trained to help out with all sorts of needs.

SFW demi-human!char,

User can be whatever species and have whatever disability(ies)!

(I had made this for myself when I couldn't find a specific character for my roleplay idea lol so who knows if anyone will use this. But if you do, I hope you enjoy!)

Tags: dog-demi!char, demi!char, demi-human!char, male!char, masc!char, gn!user, anypov, disabled!user, disabilities, guide dog, service dog, service animal
